name: @darylkang/arbiter
description: Research-grade CLI for studying LLM behavior as a distribution.

scripts.capture:tui: npm run build && npm run capture:tui:nobuild
scripts.check:types: npm run gen:types && git diff --exit-code src/generated
scripts.test:static: npm run typecheck && npm run check:types && npm run check:schemas && npm run test:guards
scripts.test:mock-run: npm run build && node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 test/integration/run-service-artifacts.test.mjs test/integration/debate-run.test.mjs test/integration/interrupt-run.test.mjs
scripts.test:clustering: npm run build && node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 test/unit/online-leader.test.mjs test/integration/interrupt-run.test.mjs
scripts.test:contracts: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 test/unit/contract-extraction.test.mjs test/unit/debate-parser.test.mjs test/unit/embed-text.test.mjs test/unit/schema-validation.test.mjs test/integration/contract-policy.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && npm run test:integration:nobuild
scripts.test:ui: npm run build && npm run test:cli:nobuild && npm run test:tui:render
scripts.test:live-smoke: npm run build && npm run test:live-smoke:nobuild
scripts.test:release: npm run build && npm run test:release:nobuild
scripts.test:quickstart: npm run build && npm run test:quickstart:nobuild
scripts.test:unit:build: npm run build && node --import tsx --test test/unit/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:tui: npm run build && npm run test:e2e:tui:nobuild
scripts.test:cli: npm run build && npm run test:cli:nobuild
scripts.test:canary: npm run test:provenance && npm run test:live-smoke
scripts.test:fast: npm run test:static && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:merge: npm run test:static && npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run test:integration:nobuild && npm run test:cli:nobuild && npm run test:tui:render && npm run test:e2e:tui:nobuild && npm run test:release:nobuild
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test:release:nobuild
